title: Assignment
description: One interceptor-target assignment OR a deliberate HOLD-FIRE decision. Every entry carries full provenance: bid value, value estimate, magazine state, and the auction-round that produced it. This is the audit log the human-on-the-loop console displays.

action.description: ASSIGN: engage the target. HOLD_FIRE: deliberate decline (magazine rationing). RTB: return to base (endurance/reload).

track_id.description: Target track id; null for HOLD_FIRE/RTB.

effector_id.description: Effector type chosen; null for non-ASSIGN actions.

track_value_estimate.description: v_j: expected asset damage if this track reaches the asset

magazine_state.description: Remaining rounds per effector type at decision time

hold_reason.description: Human-readable rationale for a HOLD_FIRE decision
